chapters.title: I, Venkatesa, belonging to Kasyapa Gotra,
chapters.content_preview: 1. I, Venkatesa, belonging to Kasyapa Gotra, respectfully salute Lord Venkateswara, the Glori- ous, and narrate effects (of astrological combina- tions) for the (pleasure of the) king.  Notes: For the part from sloka 1 above till the end, i.e. sloka No.4775 appearing hereafter, t

chapters.title: One should occupya cleanspace, inaccessible
chapters.content_preview: 4. One should occupya cleanspace, inaccessible to others (i.e. one should remain immune to distur- bances), and silently pray the lord of his heart, i.e. his family deity. Aftera study of the Bhavas, everything (relevant) should be declared (in respect of a given horoscope).  wh

chapters.title: If the dasa lord is in the 7th from the dasa Rasi,
chapters.content_preview: 12. If the dasa lord is in the 7th from the dasa Rasi, consider 10 years. The dasa years divided by twelve will yield the durations of the various Buktis. Ac- cording the Rasi being odd or even, the distribution should be in direct or reverse order.  argelara: -

chapters.title: The said Matta Maatanga Yoga will be
chapters.content_preview: 25. The said Matta Maatanga Yoga will be nullified if the lord of the ascendant occupies an inimical sign or the sign of his debility. One born in the said yoga (when in tact) will be wealthy owning limitless sums.  Breathe aeate ys adhe sat arreet ward aeTagUTET SATS EAT

chapters.title: Malaviya Yoga: Venus in strength in an
chapters.content_preview: 26. Malaviya Yoga: Venus in strength in an angle identical with his own sign or sign of exaltation will cause what is called Malaviya Yoga. The person born in this yoga will be the lord of a number of elephants, horses, chariots and palanquins, apart from lands, forts and the lik

chapters.title: Cancellation: In the process of the above
chapters.content_preview: 27. Cancellation: In the process of the above yoga being present, Jupiter joining Saturn will nullify the yoga whereupon the exaltation (note the term “exaltation”) effects of Venus will go in vain. And the person will be troubled due to planetary blemish- es.  Notes: It is to be

chapters.content_preview: 28. Yoga With Debilitation Navamsas: Evena son of the ruler of the (whole) earth will become the head of underworld or Paataala (i.e. will have steep, irreconcilable fall in position), will earn his meal by beggary and will be chiefamong naked ascetics when  all the planets are i

chapters.title: A planet in exaltation sign and debilitation
chapters.content_preview: 29. A planet in exaltation sign and debilitation Navamsa will be grievous. The one in debilitation sign with exaltation Navamsa will be a source of happiness. Pleasures, and Raja Yoga will follow a planet that is Vargottama in its own sign.  seared freee fereretsear ate | aster a

chapters.title: Two orthree planets atone and the same time
chapters.content_preview: 30. Two orthree planets atone and the same time being exalted in evil houses will make one’s life difficult; their debilitation Navamsa positions in this yoga will be more troublesome.  fife: eat anh ara Gases: | Gael MATA sera TATA way fens ah art wearer |

chapters.title: Three planets in their respective own signs
chapters.content_preview: 31. Three planets in their respective own signs will produce pleasures. Their being in the Navamsas owned by Yogakarakas (significators of prosperity) will give a comfortable life. Their weakness and occupation of Navamsas owned by Avayoga Karakas (obstructors to prosperity, cont

chapters.title: If the luminaries are found, along with all
chapters.content_preview: 35. If the luminaries are found, along with all benefics, inthe 6th, 7th and 8th, while (other) malefics are confined to the 9th, the subject will be kingly, learned, fortunate, strong, inwardly fearing ("Antarbhava" reads as "Antarbhaye" in another  version), and be endowed with

chapters.title: Whetherin Lagnadhi Yoga, orin Chandradhi
chapters.content_preview: 36. Whetherin Lagnadhi Yoga, orin Chandradhi Yoga, if the Sth from the concerned place (i.e. from ascendant or from the Moon as the case may be) is occupied by a “benefic” or by a malefic, the Yoga in question goes in vain.  Notes: A benefic additionally mentioned for the 5th hou

chapters.title: One born in Chandradhi Yoga will be an
chapters.content_preview: 37. One born in Chandradhi Yoga will be an army head, while the Lagnadhi Yoga will make one worshipped by the king, endowed with wealth, lands, kingdom and wide pleasures.  Saat sees as BAT at nemrafataeet afar AEGTATT URC Ul

chapters.title: In the formation of Chandradhi Yoga, the
chapters.content_preview: 38. In the formation of Chandradhi Yoga, the Sun’s occupation of the 7th from the Moon denotes that the person will enjoy a medium span of life (66 years as stated elsewhere in the earlier pages), be intelligent, and will have many sons.  Notes: From this we understand that three

chapters.title: In the case of Lagnadhi Yoga, if the Moon
chapters.content_preview: 39. In the case of Lagnadhi Yoga, if the Moon joins a malefic, it is a (mere or ordinary) Raja Yoga. But the life span will be short.  Notes: Here again, as in the previous aphorism, life-span is discussed.  AeaG Tear aa

chapters.title: Saturn - Venus yoga: If the planet Saturn in
chapters.content_preview: 40. Saturn - Venus yoga: If the planet Saturn in  strength joins Venus and obtains its own divisions including Yoga Karaka Navamsa, the person will be wealthy, intelligent, famous, lustful and will be ever skillful in accomplishing tasks assigned by the king.  aan Fe YEAH |

chapters.title: Saturn in the company of a benefic and in
chapters.content_preview: 41. Saturn in the company of a benefic and in Vargottama Navamsa, in Rajyavastha(?) will causea Raja Yoga (leading position and prosperity).  art Aherra: Bat serge: Hexen: Beraate stare qetseay aftr | Tat Tahar, Feraeya: Sarasa

chapters.title: Malefics in debility while benefics instrength
chapters.content_preview: 42. Malefics in debility while benefics instrength occupy angles and trines as the lords of the 10th and 9th are (together) in the 9th or 10th will give the following effects. He will be a king ruling his own land, be highly mighty, and be endowed with fame, valour and longevity.

chapters.content_preview: 53. One will enjoy prosperity and fame if the Aroodha Pada for the ascendant or for the 9th is in relation with Venus either by aspect or association.  TeSAY TS Tess esa waa faa | Amie AeA Fat TRATTTATTA TA, BATT IG

chapters.title: Should Venus be in the 11th from Aroodha
chapters.content_preview: 54. Should Venus be in the 11th from Aroodha ascendant (Aroodha Laabhe) in strength, or aspect the said 11th, or should Venus be in the ascendant with the Moon, it will grant conveyances, minis- tership, elephants and headship of an army.  Notes: “Yogamsake” is redundant.

chapters.title: Three Planets: With three planets in exalta
chapters.content_preview: 69. Three Planets: With three planets in exalta- tion, one will be highly intelligent. If three are inown signs, he will be a minister. A dull-witted person is born with three planets indebility. He will have grief- ridden livelihood if three are exalted but in degrees causing an

chapters.title: The Sun’s Navamsa Positions: Short life
chapters.content_preview: 80. The Sun’s Navamsa Positions: Short life will come to pass if the Sun is in:  (a) the sign Gemini with Capricorn Navamsa.  (b) the sign Sagittarius with Cancer Navamsa.  (c) the sign Virgo with Aries Navamsa.

chapters.title: Danger to Father e/ cetera: Should the Sun
chapters.content_preview: 81. Danger to Father e/ cetera: Should the Sun be in the 12th house, or if Saturn is in Aswini, or in the 7th or its trine, or in the 10th there will be danger to father etc. in the childhood of the native.  Notes: Father et cetera includes paternal rela- tives.

chapters.title: Royal Favours: One will beget favours from
chapters.content_preview: 92. Royal Favours: One will beget favours from the emperor if Venus is in the Sth or in the 2nd while his dispositor is strong.  Notes: “Rajapoojyamsage” does not convey any sensible meaning. It simply means “in the Amsa or degree of royal honour”.

chapters.title: The 2nd lord endowed with strength should
chapters.content_preview: 93. The 2nd lord endowed with strength should be inthe 7th house while the Moonis inthe 2nd house. Mercury should be ina sign ruled by Mars (i.e. Aries only). The planet Venus should be in Pisces in the company of the Sun. All these existing at one and the Same time will bless th

chapters.content_preview: 94. The 8th lord in the 8th while Mercury is inthe 6th will give the following effects. The subject will be ever anxious to receive charities, be blessed by the goddess of beauty, be troubled by penury, will un-  dergo numerous difficulties, will attain prosperity lateron, will h

chapters.title: Evil Lords: The 8th lord in the 6th or 12th,
chapters.content_preview: 95. Evil Lords: The 8th lord in the 6th or 12th, the 6th lord in the 8th or 12th, and the 12th lord in the 6th or 8th, or these three planets in their above- specified own houses in mutual aspects only between them (to the exclusion of other association) - this yoga will make one

chapters.title: Jupiter & Venus: If JupiterisinRajayogamsa
chapters.content_preview: 97. Jupiter & Venus: If JupiterisinRajayogamsa (?) while Venus is in the 2nd or 8th, the person will be lustful, charitable and will indulge in wicked (or questionable) deeds.  Note: Rajayogamsa is not a standard term.  gamete wafaer saree |

chapters.title: Short Life: The lords of the 6th and 8th
chapters.content_preview: 98. Short Life: The lords of the 6th and 8th joining together in aspect to, or in association with, Satum will reduce life-span.  Notes: The 8th lord alonc related to Saturn gives longevity. It is only when the 8th lord joins the 6th lord and gets related to Saturn, that life spa

chapters.content_preview: 99. Yoga fora Paramour: If Venus is in the 7th ora trine thereof in aspect to a malefic, the subject will be the paramour of a married woman and will indulge in buying females for his livelihood.  Agel at ate aferaret | PearMpAaa AT- Bt werent SrA ilo I

chapters.content_preview: 1. Malefic’s Sub Period - Fever, distress and professional troubles to self; Danger from poison, thieves, fire and government to his relatives.  2.
